items.title_zh: 租用非 Nvidia 伺服器存取權的 RunPod 在 Summit Partners 的帶領下以 10 億美元的估值籌集了 1 億美元，消息人士稱，該估值高於 2024 年種子期後的 1 億美元（Stephanie Palazzolo/The Information）

items.title: Microsoft's Digital Crimes Unit says AI helped it link two separate hacking tools, Amadey and StealC, and file a single civil lawsuit to help take them down (Lorelei Smillie/Bloomberg)
items.title_original: Microsoft's Digital Crimes Unit says AI helped it link two separate hacking tools, Amadey and StealC, and file a single civil lawsuit to help take them down (Lorelei Smillie/Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Microsoft's Digital Crimes Unit says AI helped it link two separate hacking tools, Amadey and StealC, and file a single civil lawsuit to help take them down (Lorelei Smillie/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 微軟數位犯罪部門表示，人工智慧幫助其將兩個獨立的駭客工具 Amadey 和 StealC 聯繫起來，並提起民事訴訟以幫助將它們拿下（Lorelei Smillie/Bloomberg）
items.title_bilingual: 微軟數位犯罪部門表示，人工智慧幫助其將兩個獨立的駭客工具 Amadey 和 StealC 聯繫起來，並提起民事訴訟以幫助將它們拿下（Lorelei Smillie/Bloomberg） / Microsoft's Digital Crimes Unit says AI helped it link two separate hacking tools, Amadey and StealC, and file a single civil lawsuit to help take them down (Lorelei Smillie/Bloomberg)

items.title: Qualcomm says it will acquire Modular, which builds a chip software platform and has a proprietary coding language, in a nearly $4B deal set to close in H2 2026 (Lauren Goode/Wired)
items.title_original: Qualcomm says it will acquire Modular, which builds a chip software platform and has a proprietary coding language, in a nearly $4B deal set to close in H2 2026 (Lauren Goode/Wired)
items.title_en: Qualcomm says it will acquire Modular, which builds a chip software platform and has a proprietary coding language, in a nearly $4B deal set to close in H2 2026 (Lauren Goode/Wired)
items.title_zh: 高通表示，它將以近 40 億美元的交易收購 Modular，後者構建了一個晶片軟體平台並擁有專有的編碼語言，交易將於 2026 年下半年完成（Lauren Goode/Wired）

items.title_zh: 資料來源：自 1 月 IPO 以來，智浦股價飆升 2,000%，推動其市值超過 128B 美元，之後該公司正在考慮在香港出售價值數十億美元的股票（曹東/彭博社）

items.title_zh: 消息人士透露，客戶互動服務 MoEngage 收購了 Aampe，後者的人工智慧代理商幫助品牌個人化訊息傳遞，價值「數千萬」； Aampe 籌集了約 2,800 萬美元（Jagmeet Singh/TechCrunch）
